01 — About

Senior Product Designer with 5+ years turning complex workflows into intuitive, scalable digital products.

My path from Gaming → Pharma → Banking gives me a rare cross-industry lens on trust, engagement, and clarity.

At Globant I work end-to-end — UX flow analysis, high-fidelity UI, Design Systems, and QA — on products used by millions. I integrate AI tools (Claude, Gemini) to accelerate research synthesis and explore directions faster.

I hold a Postgraduate in UX Research and a Graphic Design degree: I speak pixels and strategy.

02 — Selected Work

01

BAC Credomatic

Fintech · Mobile Banking · Central America

End-to-end redesign of a mobile banking app serving 4M+ users across 6 countries. Joined at 20 team members, scaled to 150+. Owned critical flows — Login, Biometric Auth, Enrollment, Password Recovery — and built a Design System ensuring visual consistency across a multi-team org.

Design System iOS / Android 4M+ Users Accessibility QA

02

BeHealthy

HealthTech · Gamification · Pharma

Gamified health and wellness platform built in partnership with Apple, designed as a white-label solution for corporate clients and telecom partners internationally. Contributed to gamification flows, data visualization dashboards, and supported the RTL visual adaptation for Arabic-speaking users.

Gamification RTL / Arabic White-label Data Viz

03

Imagine Learning

EdTech · Enterprise CMS · Desktop

Desktop-first enterprise UX for Cosmos — an internal CMS managing K-12 educational content at scale. Focused on reducing cognitive load for power users managing complex lesson plans daily, through user flow analysis, iterative design cycles, and stakeholder reviews.

Enterprise CMS Desktop UX Info Architecture B2B SaaS
